enable.title: Enable scrobbler
enable.subtitle: Automatically detect anime titles and episodes when a player is running

delay.title: Update delay (seconds)
delay.subtitle: Time to watch an episode before marking it as watched on MyAnimeList

processes.title: App Tracking
processes.tracked_apps_sub: Choose which players and browsers should be automatically detected

status.disabled_hint: If the list is empty, tracking is disabled.
status.enable_hint: Enable the scrobbler in settings to detect media.

matching.sources_tip: TIP: If you open a player with something playing, it will appear here automatically
matching.select_correct: Please select the correct anime from the list:
matching.not_matched_desc: We couldn't auto-match this anime. You can look it up manually.

rules.applied_prompt: Changes are applied immediately after saving.

skip_notify.title: Skip-ahead protection
skip_notify.subtitle: If the playing episode is ahead of your progress by more than one episode, send a notification instead of updating
skip_notify.body: Episode {0} detected, but next expected is Ep {1} — progress not updated
